belier.intro: The Sun travels through the final degrees of Taurus and lights up your zone of resources, dear Aries. The waning moon invites you to slow your warrior tempo and savor what you've already built. Mars, your celestial ruler, supports a day of grounded productivity rather than thunderous conquest.
belier.love: Venus settles a sensory softness onto your affections and you can lower the armor for a few hours. If you're partnered, a simple gesture is worth a thousand fiery declarations. Single, your quiet presence draws more than any show of force.
belier.work: This Taurus passage of the Sun helps you turn your energy into tangible value, contracts, negotiations, personal finances. You have a chance to sort the projects that feed your account from those that drain your time. Move one measured step ahead instead of leaping in bursts.
belier.energy: Your Martian fire enjoys burning at a small steady flame today, like patient embers. Eat slowly and offer your body a guilt-free rest stop.
belier.intuition: The waning moon whispers that your best ideas come from inner silence. Listen to what your body tells you before consulting your mind.
belier.mantra: My strength grows through patience and presence
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun still radiates through your sign before handing over to Gemini next week, dear Taurus. This final stretch of your solar season invites you to fully embody what you want to plant for the year ahead. Venus, your ruler, sets spring flowers along your path.
taureau.love: Your Venusian magnetism works gently and needs no spectacular effort to function. Partnered, propose a moment of embodied tenderness rather than a big discussion. Single, you can let someone surprise you without already planning everything.
taureau.work: The waning moon invites you to finalize a lingering file before opening a new site. Your ability to structure the details makes the difference today, especially with a financial decision. Keep your steady rhythm, your inner tortoise moves faster than you think.
taureau.energy: Your body wants something tangible, a good meal, a sunlit walk, a moment in the garden. Politely decline invitations that would scatter you too thin.
taureau.intuition: Your wisdom comes from your hands and senses more than your thoughts. Touch, smell, taste, and the answer arrives through this ancient channel.
taureau.mantra: I fully embody what I want to bloom
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Sun crosses your house of rest and inner life, dear Gemini, before returning to your sign soon. This waning moon phase prepares your solar birthday and asks for a serious mental spring cleaning. Mercury, your ruler, slides toward your sign and your words regain their precision.
gemeaux.love: You have a chance to observe your ties with more depth than usual, without scattering into a thousand branches. Partnered, a slow conversation works wonders. Single, take time to understand what truly touches you rather than what merely amuses.
gemeaux.work: This Taurus passage invites you to neatly close pending files before a new cycle opens. You can use the quiet to clarify your intentions and reformulate a proposal that found no taker. Discretion is your best asset today.
gemeaux.energy: Your mind spins fast but your body craves stretches of silence. A walk without your phone returns more than you give it.
gemeaux.intuition: The waning moon shows what you've been carrying in surplus inside your bag. Set down, sort, release, and your ideas regain their natural flow.
gemeaux.mantra: I clear space to welcome what is new
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Sun activates your zone of friendships and collective projects, dear Cancer, gently coaxing you out of your shell. The waning moon, your celestial ruler, invites you to release what you've been carrying for others too long. A day to choose your tribe with sharper discernment.
cancer.love: Your sensitive heart finds refuge in quality rather than quantity of exchanges. Partnered, share a vision of the future that makes you both vibrate. Single, a friend circle could introduce someone whose presence soothes rather than stirs.
cancer.work: The Taurus Sun boosts your collaborations and strategic alliances. You have a chance to ask for support you'd been refusing out of pride, and it lands better than expected. Think network rather than solo hero.
cancer.energy: Your energy follows the descending lunar rhythm and that's perfectly fine. Avoid overloading your social calendar, choose one or two truly nourishing people.
cancer.intuition: The waning moon refines your perceptions about your true affinities. You sense instantly who is aligned and who no longer is, trust this compass.
cancer.mantra: I choose the bonds that nourish my soul
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Sun, your ruling star, illuminates your professional and public zone from Taurus, dear Leo. The waning moon invites you to consolidate your stance rather than shine at all costs. You can let your aura work in muted mode, and it only becomes more radiant for it.
lion.love: Your magnetic presence operates without your needing to stage anything. Partnered, listen as much as you radiate and balance naturally returns. Single, someone observes you with admiration in a rather serious or professional context.
lion.work: You have a chance to settle into your authority with calm and precision today. The Taurus Sun rewards reliability more than flash, show that you can hold the long arc. A decisive meeting may turn on your ability to listen before proposing.
lion.energy: Your solar fire likes being fed without excess, like a well-tended hearth. Favor a steady physical activity over a spectacular effort.
lion.intuition: Your royal intuition whispers that real recognition is built in the silence of work well done. Stay faithful to your vision without shouting it from the rooftops.
lion.mantra: I shine through constancy more than flash
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Sun activates your zone of expansion, travel and study, from your earth ally Taurus, dear Virgo. The waning moon and Mercury, your ruler, slipping toward Gemini, offer a rare window to breathe wider. You can loosen your inner exigence without losing any quality.
vierge.love: Your Virgo heart looks for meaning as much as tenderness, and this day favors deep conversations. Partnered, share an adventure project even a modest one. Single, someone culturally different could spark your curiosity.
vierge.work: The Taurus passage of the Sun helps you see big without losing your sense of detail. You can propose training, a work trip, or a project that widens your usual horizon. Mercury entering Gemini fluidifies your communications in the days ahead.
vierge.energy: Your body needs a new way to move today, change your usual walking route. The change of frame relaxes your nerves more than a long stretching session.
vierge.intuition: Your inner signs push you toward exploration rather than analysis. Drop your inner spreadsheet a bit and welcome the unexpected as a gift.
vierge.mantra: I allow myself to see beyond my plan
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Sun illuminates your zone of intimacy and deep transformation, dear Libra. The waning moon in company with Venus, your celestial ruler, invites you to notice what is silently shifting inside you. A day favorable to sincere dialogues that rebalance a latent situation.
balance.love: Venus speaks to your Libra heart in a more intimate than social key. Partnered, you can broach a topic you'd been postponing with new grace. Single, today's attraction rises from the depths, not from appearance.
balance.work: The Taurus Sun activates your shared resources, joint finances or strategic collaborations. You have a chance to renegotiate an agreement that no longer quite suited you. Keep your trademark composure and your words will do all the work.
balance.energy: Your subtle balance asks today for special attention to sleep and hydration. Avoid emotionally charged atmospheres.
balance.intuition: Your inner sense of justice weighs the invisibles with finesse. You feel what must change in a relationship without needing to verbalize it all.
balance.mantra: I gently transform what no longer balances me
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Sun crosses your zone of partnerships and the other, dear Scorpio, gently confronting you with the quality of your bonds. The waning moon, under Pluto your ruler's gaze, asks you to release a subtle grip. A day to practice trust rather than control.
scorpion.love: Your Scorpio depth meets the Taurean steadiness of the other, which does you good despite your resistance. Partnered, accept a suggestion without turning it into a debate. Single, someone calm and reliable deserves your attention even if the intensity isn't immediate.
scorpion.work: The Taurus passage of the Sun lights up your collaborations and contracts. You can close a favorable agreement if you accept yielding a little on detail to win on essence. Your strategic instinct remains your best ally.
scorpion.energy: Your physical intensity likes a precise channel today, sport, art, dance, rather than rumination. Move what you don't want to replay mentally.
scorpion.intuition: Your inner radars catch the unspoken with near surgical precision. Use this information to understand, not to run an investigation.
scorpion.mantra: I trust and release the grip
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Sun activates your zone of daily life and work, dear Sagittarius, asking you to cherish the small routines that carry you. The waning moon, under Jupiter your ruler's eye, invites you to prune your calendar. A day where simplicity is your best horse.
sagittaire.love: Your archer's heart appreciates concrete attentions today, a shared tea, a tender message, a prepared meal. Partnered, tend to the everyday like one tends a warm hearth. Single, an encounter at work or in a routine could surprise you.
sagittaire.work: The Taurus Sun rewards your ability to structure your time and finish what you start. You can settle a lingering administrative matter and lighten your mental load. Mercury entering Gemini also activates your sense of contact in the days ahead.
sagittaire.energy: Your body wants a calmer rhythm than usual, and that's a message to respect. Choose a gentle activity over your favorite sport in intense mode.
sagittaire.intuition: Your Jupiterian flair sees the big picture, but today the details carry the clues. Lean into what you'd been neglecting, a pearl hides there.
sagittaire.mantra: I tend the small to support the great
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Sun radiates in your zone of joy, creativity and love, dear Capricorn. The waning moon under the wise gaze of Saturn your ruler invites you to release a requirement and savor what is already here. A day where your rigor yields to real tenderness.
capricorne.love: Venus offers your Capricorn heart an unusual and welcome lightness. Partnered, plan a playful moment with no agenda, just for the pleasure. Single, your charm operates when you stop looking for someone perfect.
capricorne.work: The Taurus Sun stimulates your creativity and personal initiatives. You can propose an original idea in a setting you usually keep strictly classic. Your natural authority can carry this novelty with credibility.
capricorne.energy: Your body needs play and pleasure movement today, not performance. Find an activity that makes you laugh or smile during the effort.
capricorne.intuition: Your Saturnian wisdom hums that productivity also passes through joy. Grant yourself one hour for nothing and you'll harvest ten of clarity.
capricorne.mantra: I let joy become a sacred discipline
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Sun illuminates your roots, your home and your family, dear Aquarius, inviting an anchoring you sometimes flee. The waning moon under Uranus your innovating ruler's inspiration proposes an inner change rather than a visible revolution. A day where your home becomes your laboratory.
verseau.love: Your close ties gain from receiving sincere, non distant attention today. Partnered, create a homebound parenthesis that truly brings you closer. Single, a presence from family circle or childhood could take an unexpected place again.
verseau.work: The Taurus Sun invites you to organize your workspace like fertile ground for your ideas. A well tended remote setup or rearranged desk corner can boost your creativity more than you'd think. Lay the foundations before launching the rocket.
verseau.energy: Your airy body asks today for an anchoring through the feet, barefoot walking, gardening, contact with earth. The ground recharges you better than an extra dose of coffee.
verseau.intuition: Your Uranian intuition catches a tender truth about your lineage or origins. Honor what surfaces without rushing it.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Sun activates your zone of communication, words, writing and short messages, dear Pisces. The waning moon, under the mystic veil of Neptune your ruler, gifts you a strikingly clear and apt voice today. A day to say what's been crossing through you for a long time.
poissons.love: Your water heart expresses its subtleties with rare legibility today. Partnered, daring to name a vague feeling turns it into a bridge. Single, a well chosen message can open a door you thought closed.
poissons.work: The Taurus Sun favors your daily exchanges, emails, calls, light negotiations. You have a chance to resend a proposal you hadn't dared to send and the reply might surprise you positively. Mercury entering Gemini supports this dynamic in the days that follow.
poissons.energy: Your nervous system appreciates calm and flowing atmospheres today. Avoid relentless notifications and favor soft music while you work.
poissons.intuition: Your Neptunian perception condenses into simple, powerful words. Note your thoughts as they pass, they carry a message for your week.
poissons.mantra: My words faithfully translate my heart
poissons.author: Sibylle
